chunks.title: Reign and Character of Ahaz
chunks.reason: Introduces King Ahaz and describes his wicked reign compared to David.

chunks.title: Syrian-Israelite Alliance and Assyrian Intervention
chunks.reason: Narrates the siege of Jerusalem by Rezin and Pekah and Ahaz's appeal to Tiglath-pileser.

chunks.title: The New Altar in the Temple
chunks.reason: Details Ahaz's visit to Damascus, the copy of the altar, and the priest Urijah's execution of the king's orders.

chunks.title: Alterations to Temple Furnishings
chunks.reason: Describes Ahaz removing the bronze stands, laver, and covered way for the sake of Assyria.

chunks.title: Conclusion of Ahaz's Reign
chunks.reason: Summarizes the record of his acts and notes his death and succession by Hezekiah.
